title: Projects
subtitle: Containers grouping tasks and product runs.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.body: Create a project to group related tasks and product runs.

noMatch.title: No matching projects
noMatch.body: No projects match the current filters. Try widening or clearing them.

create.title: New project
create.subtitle: Create a portfolio container to group related tasks and product runs.
create.workflowNoStartRun: You don't have permission to start workflow runs, so this project will be created without a pinned workflow.
create.error: Could not create the project. Please try again.

detail.notFoundBody: This project may have been removed, or you may not have access to it.

tasks.heading: {{count}} tasks
tasks.emptyBody: Create a task to start tracking work on this project.
tasks.addComingSoon: Creating tasks lands in a later update.

runs.heading: {{count}} product runs
runs.emptyBody: Product runs appear here once a task starts its governing engine run.

history.heading: Activity
history.emptyBody: Project activity will appear here as tasks are created and progress.

detail.editError: Couldn't save the description. Please try again.

roundProgress.label: Round {{round}} — {{completed}} of {{enrolled}} done
roundProgress.hint: Enrolled tasks completed in the current round

reopen.body: Each reopened task keeps its identity and documents and starts a fresh run under a new round.
reopen.blockedHint: This task's current round is still running — it must finish before it can be reopened.
reopen.error: Couldn't reopen the selected tasks. Please try again.
